name: S-14 standards-add exits two when the inferred or supplied id collides with an existing registry entry
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: example-spec\n  url: https://example.com/spec\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://example.com/spec --id example-spec 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'collision' err.txt && echo collided 1>&2
